title: metate review finding set
description: Structured findings a read-only reviewer returns. Used as `codex exec --output-schema` (and the cursor/gemini equivalent) so each reviewer's final response is typed JSON the orchestrator can merge in shell.

file.description: Repo-relative path of the file the finding is in.

line.description: 1-indexed line the finding anchors to (0 when not line-specific).

bucket.description: blocker = wrong behavior / security / violated reviewFocus invariant / won't build. warning = real but non-blocking. suggestion = elegance/DESIGN (never auto-applied).

rationale.description: Why it is real and why it lands in this bucket; concrete failing input/state where applicable.
